titleStmt.title: SII 24.163: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 163. (A.R. No. 30 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records an endowment of money, by Periyapirāṭṭi, the wife of Rāyappaḷḷi Kaṇḍaṉ-Gōvinda-cheṭṭiyār the Ōlaikkārar of the Śrīvaishṇavas of the Periyakōyil in return for her maintenance out of offerings to god. The endowed amount is stated to be her share of gold left by her husband as her jīvaṉaśēsha, his own share of the amount of gold having already been endowed by Gōvinda-cheṭṭiyār himself to the deity for an ornament. The record is dated in the 31st year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 periya koyil śrīvaiṣṇa
varkaḷ Ōlaikāra rāyappaḷḷik kaṇṭaṉ kovinta ceṭṭiyār Akamuṭaiyāḷ periyapirāṭṭi kaṇṭu
taṅkaḷ mutaliyār Ikkovinta ceṭṭiyār tammutāna cavaṭippūṇunūl Oṉṟiṉāl pattaraimāṟṟu
Accuttūkkam poṉ nūṟṟu Oru kaḻañce mukkāle mañcāṭiyil Oṉṟu pāti poṉ perumāḷukkut tiruvā
paraṇamāka Ivar kuṭuttu nikki niṉṟa Oṉṟu pāti poṉṉum taṉakku jivana śeṣamāka Ivar tanta I
tu paṇi Aḻakitākaiyāle Oṉṟākac cātti Aruḷak kaikkoṇṭu Iṉakku jivanattukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku I
raṇṭu tirupparikalam peṟuveṉākap paṇṇaveṇumeṉṟu tāṉ collukaiyāle Ippaṭi ceyvatāl Ippoṉ
perumāḷukkuc cāttiyaruḷa poṟpaṇṭārattile Oṭukkivittu koḷkaiyil Ivvāṇṭu vaikācimāsam Irupattu
Aiñcān tiyati mutal taṉakku jivaṉattukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Iraṇṭu tirupparikala prasādam ciṟukālaic canti
yil Aiñcā nāḷikaiyile peṟakkaṭavaḷākavum peṟumiṭattu taṉakkum taṉmakkaḷ makkaḷukkum kāṇiyā
ka peṟakkaṭavaḷākavum piḷḷaiyum nāṅkaḷum tiruppaṇi ceyvārkaḷum kūṭa niccayittu tantom Ippaṭi Iṉṉāḷ mutal peṟuvate .
Digital edition of SII 24.163 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
